findings.msg: ModalKind enum has 5 members (['audio', 'document', 'image', 'text', 'video']); spec requires 8 (['audio', 'image', 'lidar', 'medical', 'panoptic', 'text', 'three_d', 'video']); missing: ['lidar', 'medical', 'panoptic', 'three_d']
findings.scenario: User uploads LiDAR .las file → parser dispatcher returns 'no parser for kind=lidar'
findings.repro: from imdf.multimodal.types import ModalKind; print([m.value for m in ModalKind])

findings.msg: Only 4 business modalities registered: ['three_d_pointcloud', 'lidar', 'medical_dicom', 'panoptic_segmentation']; spec requires 8 (3d/lidar/medical/panoptic + 4 more)
findings.scenario: Cross-modal RAG cannot route LiDAR / Medical / Panoptic data
findings.repro: from imdf.multimodal.business_modalities import list_modalities; print([m.id for m in list_modalities()])

findings.msg: ImageParser never calls img._getexif(); no GPS/camera/lens info
findings.scenario: Geo-tagged photos stored without lat/lon; provenance lost
findings.repro: from imdf.multimodal.parsers import ImageParser; from imdf.multimodal.types import MediaRef, ModalKind; ImageParser().parse(MediaRef(kind=ModalKind.IMAGE, data_b64=...))

findings.msg: AudioParser only has ['duration_sec', 'size_bytes']; uses size/2000 heuristic; no real bitrate/sample_rate/channels/codec
findings.scenario: Audio assets with 44.1kHz stereo mislabeled as 8kHz mono

findings.msg: CLIP returned LabelCategory.OTHER for 'a photo of a dog' (expected ANIMAL); mock implementation uses SHA256 hash, never instantiates transformers.CLIPModel
findings.scenario: All auto-labeled training data has unreliable labels

findings.msg: Consensus for 'dog' asset: conf=0.4333 label=LabelCategory.PERSON
GEOMETRY_REGISTRY has 4 types; spec requires 10; missing: ['keypoint', 'mask', 'obb', 'point', 'polygon', 'rect']
findings.scenario: Cannot annotate images with rectangles or polygons; only 3D/LiDAR/BBox/Panoptic supported

findings.msg: Ingestion rejected evil CSV but did not raise clear error: {'success': True, 'data': {'table': 'imported_data', 'rows_imported': 1, 'columns': ['id); DROP TABLE x; --', 'value'], 'total_in_file': 1}}

medical_dicom embedder returns ~80% zero vector (hash-fingerprint fallback); no semantic features
panoptic_segmentation embedder returns ~80% zero vector (hash-fingerprint fallback); no semantic features
ActiveLearningStrategy.label computes entropy from len(asset.caption) — fake heuristic, not real Shannon entropy from prediction distribution
findings.scenario: AL routing decisions are arbitrary text-length based
findings.repro: from imdf.labeling.auto_strategy import ActiveLearningStrategy; await strategy.label(asset_with_long_caption)

findings.msg: AQL sample() is pure uniform random — no stratified / weighted sampling by category or defect rate
Generic fallback ModalityAsset only has filename in metadata (['filename']); missing ingested_at, source, ingestion_job_id
AuditChain methods = ['TABLE_NAME', 'append', 'assert_chain', 'export_json', 'last_entry', 'load_all', 'verify_chain']; no query(event_type, time_range) or trace(asset_id) API
parse_media_item('https://.../model.obj') returned kind=image; should be three_d/document-classified, not best-effort IMAGE default
ExportEngine has two overlapping dispatch methods: export() and export_with_manager(); confusing semantics, overlapping code paths
AgencyLoader only referenced in its own tests; zero consumers in routing/engine code
Geometry renderers (['Cuboid3DRenderer', 'PointCloudLiDARRenderer', 'BBox3DRenderer', 'PanopticRenderer', '_make_png_bytes']) defined but not imported by any exports/*.py
ParsedMedia fields = ['kind', 'text', 'meta', 'chunks', 'frames', 'duration_sec', 'content_hash']; missing parser_version and parsed_at — cannot distinguish results from different parser versions
